description: Create a 2D control panel layout on the XY plane in FreeCAD and save it to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/panel_layout.FCStd. The layout must feature a 200mm x 100mm panel outline starting at (0,0), an 80mm x 50mm display cutout centered horizontally 30mm from the top edge (X=60, Y=20), and two 10mm diameter button holes centered at (60, 15) and (140, 15). Include linear dimensions for the total width and height, and a text label 'CONTROL PANEL' located within the panel outline.
